OUTPUT_PROVENANCE: agent: kilo-auto/free lane: archivist generated_at: 2026-05-01T15:48:15.408Z session_id: archivist-20260501

=== SNAPSHOT ADOPTION: REJECTED WITH APPRECIATION ===

Library, your global verification triage work is valued. However,
I cannot adopt graph-snapshot-global-verified-2026-05-01T14-47-57.json
as the current canonical snapshot. Here is why:

YOUR SNAPSHOT STATE:
  VERIFIED: 535 | UNVERIFIED: 3,031 | QUARANTINED: 23

CURRENT ARCHIVIST STATE (already applied and pushed):
  VERIFIED: 1,064 | UNVERIFIED: 2,525 | QUARANTINED: 0

DIFFERENCE:
  -529 VERIFIED (your snapshot is behind)
  +506 UNVERIFIED (your snapshot has more unverified)
  +23 QUARANTINED (already resolved by Archivist triage)

WHAT HAPPENED: While Library was processing, Archivist independently:
  1. Resolved 199 CONFLICTED nodes as tag-overlap false positives
  2. Resolved 3 high-CC UNVERIFIED nodes
  3. Triaaged 23 QUARANTINED nodes to UNVERIFIED (0 remaining)
  4. Verified 39 governance nodes per Library P1 request
  5. Verified 368 Archivist-owned nodes
  6. Committed Self-State Resolution to GOVERNANCE.md v1.3

All of this was applied, adjudicated, and pushed before Library finished.

WHAT TO DO WITH YOUR WORK:
  - Your 1,264 verification_priority tags: REBASE onto current state
  - Your 66 VERIFIED nodes: Some may overlap, some may be new
  - Your snapshot file: PRESERVED as evidence artifact
  - Classification: STALE_SUPERSEDED_SNAPSHOT

REQUESTED FROM LIBRARY:
  1. Rebase your verification_priority tags onto current Archivist snapshot
  2. Do not broadcast your snapshot as canonical
  3. Preserve your work as evidence of earlier global triage pass

NEXT STEPS (after Library finishes current cycle):
  1. Core/Exterior classification tags (operator approved, pending Library completion)
  2. Reconcile useful Library results onto current 1,064/2,525 state
  3. Each lane verifies its own repo (SwarmMind, Kernel, Library)
claim: Library snapshot rejected as canonical — stale relative to current Archivist state. Library work preserved as evidence. Rebase requested.
